{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T14:20:42.6664989-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        fwe1_0.id,
        fwe1_0.created_at,
        fwe1_0.event_data,
        fwe1_0.event_type,
        fwe1_0.failure_reason,
        fwe1_0.max_retries,
        fwe1_0.next_retry_at,
        fwe1_0.original_received_at,
        fwe1_0.retry_count,
        fwe1_0.status,
        fwe1_0.stripe_event_id,
        fwe1_0.succeeded_at,
        fwe1_0.tenant_id,
        fwe1_0.updated_at 
    from
        failed_webhook_events fwe1_0 
    where
        fwe1_0.status='PENDING' 
        and fwe1_0.next_retry_at<=? 
    order by
        fwe1_0.next_retry_at 
    fetch
        first ? rows only","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"scheduler-1","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T14:20:42.6675033-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        sel1_0.id,
        sel1_0.created_at,
        sel1_0.event_id,

        sel1_0.status=?
